prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次分别为约5942→6674→5583→5931→5738，整体在5500–6700名区间波动，近3年呈小幅收窄趋势；2025年基准位次约5738名；该校在广西理科组招生计划2021–2023年均为67人，2024年65人，2025年66人；2026年计划65人，较2025年减少1人，属小幅缩招，对竞争影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第35名，近年稳定在33–36名区间，属顶尖211高校，综合实力强劲；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及学术 不端事件），但抖音热度总排名第1（高热），2024年抖音年度排名亦第1，短视频平台曝光量极高，反映报考关注度持续升温；未见明显投档断档记录；冶金工 程A+、材料科学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学与工程A-，4个A-及以上学科，材料、冶金等王牌专业对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电 子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校优势工科方向高度契合，吸引高分考生报考；广西2026年高考总考生约39.2万人，较2025年约37.96万人增长约 3.3%，竞争整体加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批370分、特殊类型招生控制线495分，与2024年基本持平，未出现大幅波动；该校位于北京市，属一线城市高校 ，对广西考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年计划小幅缩招、广西考生总数增长约3.3%以及抖音高热带来 的报考关注度上升，预计2026年竞争略有加剧，位次较2025年基准小幅后移；预测最低位次约5716名，区间5216–6216名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约5716名，区间5216–6216名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如5200名以内）可重点冲击理科试验班、计算机类等王 牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如6200名附近）建议以三档材料、机械等专业保底，同时关注二档中位次相对较低的工科试验班和能源动力类。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 5942 → 6674 → 5583 → 5931 → 5738, fluctuating within the 5500–6700 range, with a slight narrowing trend in the past three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5738; the enrollment plan for the science group in Guangxi was 67 students from 2021 to 2023, 65 in 2024, and 66 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 65 students, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a slight reduction with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 33–36 range in recent years, a top-tier 211 university with strong comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving academic misconduct incidents), but it ranks 1st in total Douyin popularity (high heat), and also 1st in the 2024 Douyin annual ranking, with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting continuously rising application attention; no obvious enrollment gaps have been observed; it has 4 A- or above disciplines: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, History of Science and Technology A+, and Environmental Science and Engineering A-, with strong appeal to candidates interested in materials, metallurgy, and related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat, highly aligned with the university's advantageous engineering directions, attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of Guangxi college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% from approximately 379,600 in 2025, intensifying overall competition; the provincial control line for the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 370 points, and the special type enrollment control line is 495 points, basically unchanged from 2024, with no significant fluctuations; the university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Guangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, a slight reduction in the 2026 plan, an approximately 3.3% increase in the total number of Guangxi candidates, and rising application attention due to high Douyin heat, competition is expected to slightly intensify in 2026, with rankings shifting slightly backward from the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5716, with a range of 5216–6216.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 5716, range 5216–6216. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; candidates significantly above the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 5200) can aim for flagship majors like Science Experimental Class and Computer Science; candidates near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 6200) are advised to use Tier 3 majors such as Materials and Mechanical Engineering as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings like Engineering Experimental Class and Energy and Power Engineering.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for the liberal arts group in 2024–2025 were approximately 1596→1557, with a slight upward trend (decreasing numbers) in recent years, indicating a minor intensification of competition; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1557; the university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Guangxi was 6 students for both 2024 and 2025; the 2026 plan is 8 students, an increase of 2 from 2025, an expansion of about 33%, which alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to top-tier 211 universities; although liberal arts are not its traditional strength, the overall level of the university still strongly attracts liberal arts candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative (due to academic misconduct incidents), but it ranks first in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high overall attention; no records of missing admission thresholds for liberal arts; the university's A- and above disciplines are concentrated in engineering (metallurgy, materials, history of science and technology, environment), with no A-class disciplines in liberal arts; Social Science Experimental Class.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a divided and wait-and-see social heat, foreign languages are generally wait-and-see, and the overall heat of liberal arts majors is stable; the total number of Guangxi college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 392,000, with the historical category accounting for approximately 31% in recent years, resulting in about 123,000 historical category candidates, an increase of about 3.3% from about 119,000 in 2025; the provincial control line for the 2025 historical category undergraduate batch is 402 points, and the special type enrollment control line is 518 points, basically unchanged from 2024; the university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional attraction for Guangxi liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight upward trend in historical rankings, the expansion of 2 students (33%) in the 2026 plan, and the approximately 3.3% increase in Guangxi historical category candidates, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate growth effect, so the ranking is expected to shift backward compared to the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1848, with a range of 1571–2125.
